'''''Star Wars Weekly'' 71''' is the seventy-first issue of the ''[[Star Wars Weekly]]'' series of comic reprints, published on [[July 4]], [[1979]].

==Contents==
*[[Star Wars (1977) 30|''Star Wars'' (1977) 30]]
*"The power of Warlock Part 4: Homecoming!"
*"Guardians of the galaxy! Part 2: Earth in chains"
*"Tales of the Watcher: When a planet dies!"
